Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest For Deceased Plaintiff
Off Calendar Nov-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest for Deceased Plaintiff is GRANTED pursuant to CCP 377.31. No opposition filed. Delores Keathley is substituted as successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff Carlton Keathley. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee; Matter Not Reported (503/CML)
